stemHtml: The geographic coordinates of an aerodrome have been updated in the AIP. Per ICAO Annex 15, how should this permanent change be published?

options.a: As an AIP Amendment, made available by the most expeditious means.
options.b: As an AIP Supplement, made available when possible.
options.c: As a NOTAM, made available when possible.
options.d: As an AIP Supplement, made available by the most expeditious means.
